+- KotlinFile
   +- T-NL
   +- T-NL
   +- PackageHeader
   |  +- T-PACKAGE
   |  +- Identifier
   |  |  +- SimpleIdentifier
   |  |  |  +- T-Identifier

   |  |     |  +- TypeReference
   |  |     |     +- UserType
   |  |     |        +- SimpleUserType
   |  |     |           +- SimpleIdentifier
   |  |     |              +- T-Identifier
   |  |     +- FunctionBody
   |  |        +- T-ASSIGNMENT
   |  |        +- Expression
   |  |           +- Disjunction
   |  |              +- Conjunction
   |  |                 +- Equality
   |  |                    +- Comparison
   |  |                       +- GenericCallLikeComparison
   |  |                          +- InfixOperation
   |  |                             +- ElvisExpression
   |  |                                +- InfixFunctionCall
   |  |                                   +- RangeExpression
   |  |                                      +- AdditiveExpression
   |  |                                         +- MultiplicativeExpression
   |  |                                            +- AsExpression
   |  |                                               +- PrefixUnaryExpression
   |  |                                                  +- PostfixUnaryExpression
   |  |                                                     +- PrimaryExpression
   |  |                                                        +- IfExpression
   |  |                                                           +- T-IF
   |  |                                                           +- T-LPAREN
   |  |                                                           +- Expression
   |  |                                                           |  +- Disjunction
   |  |                                                           |     +- Conjunction
   |  |                                                           |        +- Equality
   |  |                                                           |           +- Comparison
   |  |                                                           |           |  +- GenericCallLikeComparison
   |  |                                                           |           |     +- InfixOperation
   |  |                                                           |           |        +- ElvisExpression
   |  |                                                           |           |           +- InfixFunctionCall
   |  |                                                           |           |              +- RangeExpression
   |  |                                                           |           |                 +- AdditiveExpression
   |  |                                                           |           |                    +- MultiplicativeExpression
   |  |                                                           |           |                       +- AsExpression
   |  |                                                           |           |                          +- PrefixUnaryExpression
   |  |                                                           |           |                             +- PostfixUnaryExpression
   |  |                                                           |           |                                +- PrimaryExpression
   |  |                                                           |           |                                   +- SimpleIdentifier
   |  |                                                           |           |                                      +- T-Identifier
   |  |                                                           |           +- EqualityOperator
   |  |                                                           |           |  +- T-EQEQ
   |  |                                                           |           +- Comparison
   |  |                                                           |              +- GenericCallLikeComparison
   |  |                                                           |                 +- InfixOperation
   |  |                                                           |                    +- ElvisExpression
   |  |                                                           |                       +- InfixFunctionCall

   |  |                                                           |                                         +- PostfixUnaryExpression
   |  |                                                           |                                            +- PrimaryExpression
   |  |                                                           |                                               +- SimpleIdentifier

   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |           +- InfixFunctionCall

   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |                 +- AdditiveExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |                    +- MultiplicativeExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |                       +- AsExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |                          +- PrefixUnaryExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |                             +- PostfixUnaryExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |                                +- PrimaryExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |                                   +- SimpleIdentifier
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |                                      +- T-Identifier
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              +- EqualityOperator
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              |  +- T-EQEQ
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |              +- Comparison
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                 +- GenericCallLikeComparison
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                    +- InfixOperation

   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                          +- InfixFunctionCall

   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                    +- Expression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                       +- Disjunction
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                          +- Conjunction
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                             +- Equality
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                +- Comparison
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                   +- GenericCallLikeComparison
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                      +- InfixOperation
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                         +- ElvisExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                            +- InfixFunctionCall
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                               +- RangeExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                  +- AdditiveExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                     +- MultiplicativeExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                        +- AsExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                           +- PrefixUnaryExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                              +- PostfixUnaryExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                 +- PrimaryExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                 |  +- SimpleIdentifier
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                 |     +- T-Identifier
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                 +- PostfixUnarySuffix
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                    +- CallSuffix
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                       +- ValueArguments
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          +- T-LPAREN
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          +- ValueArgument
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |  +- Expression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |     +- Disjunction
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |        +- Conjunction
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |           +- Equality
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |              +- Comparison
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                 +- GenericCallLikeComparison
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                    +- InfixOperation
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                       +- ElvisExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                          +- InfixFunctionCall
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                             +- RangeExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                +- AdditiveExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                   +- MultiplicativeExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                      +- AsExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                         +- PrefixUnaryExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                            +- PostfixUnaryExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                               +- PrimaryExpression
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                  +- StringLiteral
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                     +- LineStringLiteral
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                        +- T-QUOTE_OPEN
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                        +- LineStringContent
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                        |  +- T-LineStrText
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                        +- T-QUOTE_CLOSE
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          +- T-RPAREN
   |  |           |  +- Semis
   |  |           |     +- T-NL
   |  |           +- T-RCURL
   |  +- Semis
   |     +- T-NL
   +- EOF
